user.title: Selectra API Token
user.description:
Enter your Selectra API token to get started.
Don't have an API token? Contact support.home-assistant@selectra.info

select_periods.title: Select Active Periods
select_periods.description: Check the periods during which your devices should run. The 'Planned Run' sensor will be active during these periods.

strategy.title: Optimization Strategy
strategy.description: Choose how to determine the best time to run your devices.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid or missing API key. Contact support.home-assistant@selectra.info to get your free key.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Selectra API. Please try again later.
error.invalid_percent: Please enter a value between 1 and 100.
error.invalid_hours: Please enter a value between 1 and 24.

abort.api_error: An error occurred while communicating with the Selectra API.
abort.no_questions: No qualification questions received from the API.
